name: crevideo-reach
description: Crevideo Reach creator-outreach toolkit — 9 skills (1 base playbook `mcp-playbook` that teaches the LLM how to drive the MCP + 8 business-scenario skills: creator fit scoring / tier resolver / offer policy / brand safety / outreach composer / reply triage / win-back & pruning / performance diagnosis) + Crevideo Reach MCP (74 tools, auto-registers as connector, OAuth on first use). Works with Claude Code, Claude.ai web, and OpenAI Codex — see README.
